use_cases: Right-click context menus for triggering actions like add to library or playlist
Desktop application-style action menus with keyboard navigation support
File or selection management menus in content management systems
Quick action overlays in productivity and media applications
Navigation shortcuts and bulk operations menus
ai_summary: A right-click context menu component built with Base UI that provides a floating overlay with menu items, separators, and hover highlight states. The component uses portal-based rendering for proper z-index management, supports dark mode styling, and includes smooth opacity transitions. Ideal for triggering contextual actions in SaaS dashboards, content editors, or file management interfaces.
